# Unit Story Map

> Minimum structure. Sections may be omitted with rationale or extended as needed.

## Coverage Matrix

| Story | Unit(s) | Coverage type |
|---|---|---|
| S-1 | [unit name] | [fully implemented / partially — remainder in unit X] |
| S-2 | [unit name, unit name] | [split across units — describe split] |

## Per-Unit Story Assignment

### [Unit Name]

| Story | What this unit implements for it |
|---|---|
| S-1 | [specific aspect of the story this unit is responsible for] |
| S-3 | [specific aspect] |

## Coverage Gaps

Stories or requirements not addressed by any unit (should be empty if decomposition is complete):

| Story/Requirement | Gap | Resolution |
|---|---|---|
| [ID] | [what's not covered] | [which unit should own it, or why it's deferred] |
